name: Captive Heart
overview: To defeat corrupt rulers, Pahnsaeng must master forbidden powers—at the cost of love. But when he's forced to marry Lady Chawala, his enemy’s sister, her warmth pierces his guarded heart. As war and emotion collide, can he protect the kingdom without destroying himself?

trailers.title: ใจขังเจ้า เริ่ม 19 มิ.ย. | Ch3Thailand
